input.command:
cd /tmp
for s in admin-user-password app-user-password app-user-password-next app-user-password-old reporting-user-password; do
  echo -n "$s: "
  kubectl get secret $s -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data}' 2>&1
  echo
done

echo "admin: $(echo YWRtaW4xMjNwYXNzd29yZA== | base64 -d)"
echo "app current: $(echo YXBwdXNlcjEyM3Bhc3N3b3Jk | base64 -d)"
echo "app next: $(echo bmV3QXBwVXNlclBhc3N3b3JkNDU2 | base64 -d)"
echo "reporting: $(echo cmVwb3J0aW5nMTIzcGFzc3dvcmQ= | base64 -d)"

app current: appuser123password
app next: newAppUserPassword456
reporting: reporting123password

input.command:
for p in 0 1 2; do
echo "=== pod $p ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-$p -- mongosh --quiet -u admin -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'print(db.hello().isWritablePrimary ? "PRIMARY" : "secondary")' 2>&1
done
input.description: Find primary, test admin auth per pod
